# styling

## Tags

**aside** — a reflective tangent. Indented from the left, italic,
slightly smaller than body. The author uses this when they want to
whisper rather than declare.

**feature-quote** — a single line or sentence pulled out for emphasis.
Large serif (~1.4× body), soft accent rule below to separate it from
the surrounding prose.

**spaghetti-italics** — a span style for conversational asides inside a
paragraph. Italic, normal weight, used mid-sentence.
